'''Stoker''' was the nickname of a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] that was trained by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] [[Kal Skirata]]. A [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] and a member of [[Gamma Squad (Galactic Republic)|Gamma Squad]], Stoker was born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to serve in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Triple Zero" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Stoker and his [[Squad/Legends|squad]] served at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the Clone Wars on the planet [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].<ref name="Triple Zero" /> However, [[Gender/Legends|he]] was the only member of his squad to survive the battle.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|318|Gamma Squad (I)}}</ref> Five [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the fight on Geonosis, Stoker was redeployed to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where the six [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]]s had barricaded themselves in the barracks of Arca Company. Together with four squads of Republic [[Commando/Legends|commandos]], Stoker took part in a stand-off before his old training sergeant, Kal Skirata, was able to solve the situation peacefully.<ref name="Triple Zero" /> Like his clone imprint,<ref name="clone troopers">{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}}</ref> Stoker stood 1.83 meters tall.<ref name="SWE" /> In combat, he used the [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class armor]] issued to clone commandos with his own customized [[Color/Legends|colors]].<ref name="Triple Zero" />

==Behind the scenes==
Stoker appeared in the [[2006]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' which was written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="Triple Zero" />
